MERGE (malware_magniber:Malware {name:'Magniber'})
ON CREATE SET
  malware_magniber.family = 'Ransomware',
  malware_magniber.summary = 'Ransomware used to compromise organizations; distributed via phishing (Oct 2022) using signed standalone JavaScript files and exploiting CVE-2022-44698 to bypass Mark-of-the-Web warnings. Historically distributed via Magnitude exploit kit; targeted South Korea in 2017; expanded across Asia in 2018 using CVE-2018-8174 for initial access.'
ON MATCH SET
  malware_magniber.family = coalesce(malware_magniber.family, 'Ransomware'),
  malware_magniber.summary = coalesce(malware_magniber.summary, 'Ransomware used to compromise organizations; distributed via phishing (Oct 2022) using signed standalone JavaScript files and exploiting CVE-2022-44698 to bypass Mark-of-the-Web warnings. Historically distributed via Magnitude exploit kit; targeted South Korea in 2017; expanded across Asia in 2018 using CVE-2018-8174 for initial access.')

MERGE (tool_magnitude:Tool {name:'Magnitude Exploit Kit'})
ON CREATE SET
  tool_magnitude.summary = 'Exploit kit used to distribute Magniber ransomware.'
ON MATCH SET
  tool_magnitude.summary = coalesce(tool_magnitude.summary, 'Exploit kit used to distribute Magniber ransomware.')

MERGE (cve_2022_44698:CVE {id:'CVE-2022-44698'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_2022_44698.summary = 'Zero-day vulnerability exploited to bypass Mark-of-the-Web security warnings, allowing malicious files to execute without alerts.',
  cve_2022_44698.published_date = date('2022-12-01')
ON MATCH SET
  cve_2022_44698.summary = coalesce(cve_2022_44698.summary, 'Zero-day vulnerability exploited to bypass Mark-of-the-Web security warnings, allowing malicious files to execute without alerts.'),
  cve_2022_44698.published_date = coalesce(cve_2022_44698.published_date, date('2022-12-01'))

MERGE (cve_2018_8174:CVE {id:'CVE-2018-8174'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_2018_8174.summary = 'Vulnerability used for initial access in 2018 as Magniber expanded targets across Asia.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_2018_8174.summary = coalesce(cve_2018_8174.summary, 'Vulnerability used for initial access in 2018 as Magniber expanded targets across Asia.')

ON CREATE SET
  tech_phishing.name = 'Phishing',

ON MATCH SET
  tech_phishing.name = coalesce(tech_phishing.name, 'Phishing'),

MERGE (victim_sk)-[:located_in]->(country_kr)
